basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi has released the official notification for 1 Research Associate posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Cancer Biology, Biochemistry, or a related biomedical discipline
qualification.details: PhD in Cancer Biology, Biochemistry, or a related biomedical discipline. In vitro and In vivo experience (animal handling, cell culture etc). Strong publication record, grant writing and experience with translational assays.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Delhi Research Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: PhD in Cancer Biology, Biochemistry, or a related biomedical discipline. In vitro and In vivo experience (animal handling, cell culture etc). Strong publication record, grant writing and experience with translational assays.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate Application Fee 2026
IIT Delhi Research Associate Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Delhi Research Associate Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Research Associate position at IIT Delhi is 29th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Cancer Biology, Biochemistry, or a closely related biomedical discipline to be eligible for this Research Associate position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 58,000/- plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Delhi Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all necessary documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Research Associate recruitment at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate position in this recruitment drive by IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the Research Associate position at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position will primarily involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110016.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Research Associate recruitment at IIT Delhi is IITD/IRD/178/2026.
